## What changed

- Describe the change plainly.

## Why it belongs

- Explain why this term, copy fix, or glossary improvement deserves to land.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused on glossary content, editorial fixes, or directly related docs
- [ ] I read `docs/content-authoring.md`
- [ ] If this PR adds a new term, it follows the existing MDX schema under `content/entries/`
- [ ] I ran `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] I ran `npm run build`
- [ ] I checked the affected entry, letter, or category pages for obvious regressions
